fix.item: Fixed display_mode not applying to multibutton mode (behavior change for sites that relied on the previous bug)
Fixed icon selector not working after adding a new multibutton subform row
Fixed button size animation ending at scale(1) instead of the configured size (FOUC)
Fixed duplicate module IDs when multiple instances are published on the same page
Fixed multibutton label text not being clickable
Fixed inline generated CSS overriding between multiple module instances
Fixed IconRepository class not loading when helper is required directly on the front-end

change.item: Multibutton main trigger is now a button element with aria-expanded and keyboard Escape support
Per-instance CSS scoping via wrapper id cnb-mod-{moduleId}
Removed @unserialize fallback for multibutton subform data
Unified multibutton JavaScript (removed duplicate inline script)
Removed legacy helper.php wrapper class (unused with Joomla 5 Dispatcher)
Install and update messages now include UTM-tracked developer links

addition.item: Display mode now uses CSS media queries (cache/CDN safe)
Optional CSS color overrides for button and icon (var() support)
Custom CSS field with security filtering
External admin icon selector assets with subform-row-add event delegation
IconRepository centralizes icon SVG definitions for admin selector and front-end rendering
CI PHP syntax lint matrix for PHP 8.1 through 8.5

note.item: If you referenced #callnowbutton in custom CSS, update selectors to #cnb-mod-{moduleId}
Developed by Mostafa Afrouzi - Web Designer & Developer

addition.item: Initial release of Call Now Button module for Joomla 5 and 6
Single button and multibutton (expanding) support
Multiple link types: Phone, WhatsApp, Custom URL
Two appearance styles: Circular icon and Icon with Text (pill-shaped)
8 position options: Bottom/Top (Left, Center, Right) + Full Width (Full Bottom, Full Top)
18 built-in icons: Phone, WhatsApp, Telegram, Instagram, Facebook, and more
Custom icon upload support
Full color customization for button and icon
Custom animations: Pulse, Bounce, Shake
Responsive design with device-specific size controls
Typography controls: Font size, color, and weight for text buttons
Custom margins control for button positioning
Tooltip themes (Light/Dark) for multibutton
Full Width positions (Full Top, Full Bottom) for Icon with Text appearance
SEO optimized: Proper rel, target, and title attributes
Accessibility features: ARIA labels and alt text
Multilingual support: English and Persian (Farsi)
Visual icon selector for easy icon picking
GitHub-based auto-update system

note.item: Developed by Mostafa Afrouzi - Web Designer & Developer
Professional Joomla services available: Custom extensions, templates, migration, SEO
